business_hours: Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM
emergency_definition: active flooding or water visibly pooling in living or commercial spaces
emergency_routing_rules: Transfer call directly to on-call emergency dispatch technician
call_transfer_rules: Immediate transfer after designation as an emergency
after_hours_flow_summary: Technician keeps a skeleton crew on call for after-hours emergencies
questions_or_unknowns: Business address not provided after hours
notes: Call escalated to emergency dispatch due to severity of issue, customer was transferred immediately
